nodes.label: graphify --update Re-extraction Gotchas
nodes.rationale: AST extraction is content-invariant so pure copy edits need no re-extraction (and re-extracting a lone file without its import targets produces phantom full-path import IDs); build_merge replace-on-re-extract also drops ALL of a re-extracted file's existing edges, so hub files like _index.md/_log.md must be re-extracted with their COMPLETE link set or edges silently vanish.
